1	import torch
     2	import torch.nn as nn
     3	import torch.nn.functional as F

     7	class ConvModule(nn.Module):
     8	    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, padding=0, bias=False):
     9	        super().__init__()
    10	        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, padding=padding, bias=bias)
    11	        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels)
    12	        self.relu = nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
    13	
    14	    def forward(self, x):
    15	        return self.relu(self.bn(self.conv(x)))
    16

    18	class PPM(nn.Module):
    19	    def __init__(self, in_channels, pool_scales=(1, 2, 3, 6), out_channels=512):
    20	        super().__init__()
    21	        self.stages = nn.ModuleList()
    22	        for scale in pool_scales:
    23	            self.stages.append(nn.Sequential(
    24	                nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d(scale),
    25	                nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, 1, bias=False),
    26	                nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
    27	                nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
    28	            ))
    29	        self.bottleneck = ConvModule(
    30	            in_channels + len(pool_scales) * out_channels,
    31	            out_channels,
    32	            3,
    33	            padding=1,
    34	        )
    35	
    36	    def forward(self, x):
    37	        size = x.shape[2:]
    38	        feats = [x]
    39	        for stage in self.stages:
    40	            feats.append(F.interpolate(stage(x), size=size, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False))
    41	        return self.bottleneck(torch.cat(feats, dim=1))
    42	
    43	
    44	class UPerHead(nn.Module):
    45	    def __init__(self, in_channels, channels=512, pool_scales=(1, 2, 3, 6), num_classes=150, dropout_ratio=0.1):
    46	        super().__init__()
    47	        self.psp_modules = PPM(in_channels[-1], pool_scales=pool_scales, out_channels=channels)
    48	        self.lateral_convs = nn.ModuleList()
    49	        self.fpn_convs = nn.ModuleList()
    50	        for ch in in_channels[:-1]:
    51	            self.lateral_convs.append(ConvModule(ch, channels, 1))
    52	            self.fpn_convs.append(ConvModule(channels, channels, 3, padding=1))
    53	        self.fpn_bottleneck = ConvModule(len(in_channels) * channels, channels, 3, padding=1)
    54	        self.dropout = nn.Dropout2d(dropout_ratio) if dropout_ratio > 0 else None
    55	        self.conv_seg = nn.Conv2d(channels, num_classes, 1)
    56	
    57	    def forward(self, features):
    58	        laterals = [lateral_conv(f) for lateral_conv, f in zip(self.lateral_convs, features[:-1])]
    59	        laterals.append(self.psp_modules(features[-1]))
    60	        for i in range(len(laterals) - 1, 0, -1):
    61	            prev_shape = laterals[i - 1].shape[2:]
    62	            laterals[i - 1] = laterals[i - 1] + F.interpolate(
    63	                laterals[i], size=prev_shape, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False
    64	            )
    65	            laterals[i - 1] = self.fpn_convs[i - 1](laterals[i - 1])
    66	        fpn_outs = [laterals[0]]
    67	        for i in range(1, len(laterals)):
    68	            fpn_outs.append(
    69	                F.interpolate(laterals[i], size=laterals[0].shape[2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)
    70	            )
    71	        output = self.fpn_bottleneck(torch.cat(fpn_outs, dim=1))
    72	        if self.dropout is not None:
    73	            output = self.dropout(output)
    74	        output = self.conv_seg(output)
    75	        return output
    76	
    77	
    78	class FCNHead(nn.Module):
    79	    def __init__(self, in_channels, channels=256, num_convs=2, num_classes=150, dropout_ratio=0.1):
    80	        super().__init__()
    81	        convs = []
    82	        for i in range(num_convs):
    83	            inc = in_channels if i == 0 else channels
    84	            convs.append(ConvModule(inc, channels, 3, padding=1))
    85	        self.convs = nn.Sequential(*convs)
    86	        self.dropout = nn.Dropout2d(dropout_ratio) if dropout_ratio > 0 else None
    87	        self.conv_seg = nn.Conv2d(channels, num_classes, 1)
    88	
    89	    def forward(self, x):
    90	        x = self.convs(x)
    91	        if self.dropout is not None:
    92	            x = self.dropout(x)
    93	        x = self.conv_seg(x)
    94	        return x
    95	
    96	
    97	class SegmentationModel(nn.Module):
    98	    def __init__(self, backbone_name='convnext_large.fb_in22k_ft_in1k', num_classes=150, pretrained=True):
    99	        super().__init__()
   100	        self.backbone = timm.create_model(
   101	            backbone_name,
   102	            pretrained=pretrained,
   103	            features_only=True,
   104	        )
   105	        with torch.no_grad():
   106	            dummy = torch.zeros(1, 3, 512, 512)
   107	            feats = self.backbone(dummy)
   108	            in_channels = [f.shape[1] for f in feats]
   109	        self.decode_head = UPerHead(in_channels=in_channels, num_classes=num_classes)
   110	        self.auxiliary_head = FCNHead(in_channels=in_channels[2], num_classes=num_classes)
   111	
   112	    def forward(self, x):
   113	        feats = self.backbone(x)
   114	        out = self.decode_head(feats)
   115	        if self.training:
   116	            aux = self.auxiliary_head(feats[2])
   117	            return out, aux
   118	        return out
